sections_cited: Section 21 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1521 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Hearing 1. For hearing of CMA No.7693/2025 (Stay) 2. For hearing of main case. 07-05-2025 Mr. Munir ul Haq, advocate for the petitioner Syed Mohsin Ali Shah, advocate files Vakalatnama of Syed Ahsan Ali Shah on behalf of respondent department and states that the application filed by the petitioner under Section 21 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990, available at page 49, shall be decided expeditiously, preferably within ten days, vide a speaking order and after providing an opportunity of hearing to the Petitioner. He further states that pending the aforesaid no further coercive action shall be taken against the Petitioner. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied with the representation and seeks that the petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
